name: Score
about: Score Mo Games is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines sports simulation with a social, entertainment-focused atmosphere. The facility features state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators that provide a realistic and immersive golfing experience, along with additional activities like axe throwing, classic arcade games, and board games. Pricing is based on 30-minute bay increments, with pre-booking encouraged to guarantee availability. The venue is designed to accommodate various group sizes, from solo players to large parties, and offers a welcoming environment for both serious golfers and casual visitors seeking a fun outing.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic golf simulators with famous course access
Variety of multi-sport activities in one location
Flexible 30-minute pricing for short or long sessions
Veteran-owned business with a community focus
Family-friendly environment with diverse entertainment options

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is welcome, but no prepared food is served on-site. A variety of takeout and delivery menus available.
Drinks including beer, soda, and snacks are available for purchase on-site. Outside beverages are not allowed.

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers golf club rentals for those who do not have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food is welcome, but all beverages must be purchased on-site. Outside beverages are not allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Stay and play as long as you like. Bays are priced in 30-minute increments, so the time to play 18 holes depends on your pace and booking duration.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility welcomes guests of all ages. Children can join on simulators with family or play with the wide selection of board games available.
